pages.title: Light It Myself (불은 내가)
pages.tagline: Ignite your inner flame in this cathartic anthem of self-suf

pages.body: This is an emotive anthem blending gritty distorted electric guitars with polished trap percussion. The bilingual vocalist transitions from vulnerable melodic rap to explosive stadium-ready singing, charting a journey from toxic reliance on another's fire to finding internal resilience. It captures the raw acceptance of pain as the path to identity reclamation and quiet strength.
pages.styleSentence: An emotive anthem blending gritty distorted electric guitars with polished trap percussion and deep 808s at an 112 BPM (half-time feel), featuring a bilingual male vocalist who transitions from vulnerable melodic rap to explosive stadium-ready singing.

pages.text:
I know you

Your voice is still the same

No piano
Just six strings and ache

미안해

Everyone died dressed as love
너한테 다 죽여준 거

I drink it up

그냥 제일 시끄러운 밤
Just the loudest room
타오르는 걸 착각했어
누가 남은 거라고
이제 성냥을 내려놔
Now I put the matches down
그 선에서 손댄
널 진짜 사랑했다면
If I ever really loved you
불이 되어 달라 못해
I can't ask you to be my fire
아직도 조용함이 무서워
Still the quiet scares me

불은 I'll light it myself
불은 내가 켤게

또는 타오름을 두고
말 안 해
No more begging for the burn
살아있다 느끼려고
Just to feel alive
혼자라도
Even alone
어둠 속 촛불 하나
네가 켜둔 불빛
이제 내가 불씨가 될게

혼자 혼자
외로운 게 아니라 혼자
Not lonely, just alone
혼자 혼자
집에 가는 법 배우는 중

지웠어
안 되라던 것만 남겼어
네가 준 가장 다정한 건
잡아주지 않은 두 문
검은 우븐은 아직 맞아

근데 꺼진 화면 지겨워
The dead screens

I don't chase the crash now
아침을 천천히 보내
맨날 천둥이 필요했어
I used to need the thunder
누가 곁에 있다 믿으려고
이제 조용함이 I'm a star
Now the quiet doesn't scare me
거울 속 good eye

전쟁에 두고

전수업 내기는 사람
받을 자격이 있었는데
아침까지 숨 쉬어
숨 쉬고 있어
I'm breathing now
성냥으로 도망가지 마
바닥에 떨궜어
불빛 하나 켜뒀어
그걸 따라 나아가서
알고 보니 햇빛은
넘는 법이었어
내 최악의 머리
드디어 할 말 없어졌을 때
Finally had nothing to say
그리워해도
I can't miss you
보내줄 수 있어
I still let you go
우리를 사랑해도
잘할 수 있어
네
상처 안 털게
날 가두지 않을게
성냥 다시 가줘
이 페이지는 거풀게
푸른 내가
이젠 조용해
아무것도 안 태우네
다 털 참이야
I'm lighting myself
푸른 내가 켤게
I'll light the fire myself
더는 저 오름을 구걸 안 해
No more begging for the burn
살아있다 느끼려고
Just a feeling
혼자라도
Even alone
어둠 속 촛불 하나
비가 켜진 불빛
이젠 내가 불씨가 될까
I'll light it myself
I'll lighten myself
점진 시작하려는 게 아냐
I'm not the start of war
문을 찾을 만큼만
Just enough to find the dark
타오르지 않아도
I don't need to burn
돌아올 가치 있다는 걸
To be worth coming home to me
괜찮아
It's okay
밤을 보탬했어
I made it through the night
네 말이 맞았어
You were right
아픔이 필요 없었어
I didn't need the pain
넌 날 사랑했단 걸 알려고
To know
나의 온 태
불빛을 남겼어

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Cuts through noise with raw, cracked delivery that screams defiance.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Layers harmonies to soften the grit and widen emotional reach.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps a driving half-time pulse beneath every shifting mood.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Adds crisp trap hi-hats that click like ticking clocks of anxiety.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Grooves deep 808s that rumble with the weight of unspoken pain.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Weaves atmospheric pads to paint a melancholic, dreamlike backdrop.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Scatters textural glitches and ambient rain sounds for immersion.

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Distorts into walls of sound before stripping back to six strings.

members.name: KEYS
members.bio: Plays sparse piano melodies that underscore moments of quiet grief.

members.name: STRINGS
members.bio: Swells with sorrowful arcs during the bridge's intimate realization.

members.name: WOODWINDS
members.bio: Flutes whisper softly over the outro like gentle evening breezes.

members.name: BRASS
members.bio: Pumps defiant fanfares into the chorus to boost stadium energy.

levels.name: RAIN ISOLATION
levels.emotion: Vulnerable, trembling isolation with raw rain ambience

levels.name: ANXIETY STRUGGLE
levels.emotion: Anxious desperation and the struggle between wanting to call vs. knowing better

levels.name: DEFIANT RELEASE
levels.emotion: Explosive release of pain transforming into a defiant declaration of self-illumination

levels.name: SILENT ACCEPTANCE
levels.emotion: Intimate realization and the quiet acceptance that silence is no longer scary

levels.name: SELF-ILLUMINATION
levels.emotion: Triumphant self-empowerment with polished sheen over gritty emotion

levels.name: CANDLE RESOLUTION
levels.emotion: Peaceful resolution and the gentle warmth of a candle lit by oneself
